title: humboltia navicularis
intro: Humboldtia navicularis, also known as the 'boat-shaped' or 'boat-leaf' tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae, native to the Western Ghats of India. The medicinal properties of Humboldtia navicularis include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to have anticancer properties. The herbal preparations of Humboldtia navicularis include decoctions, infusions, and ointments, which are traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
